description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the site's pregnancy test timing calculator to generate a recommended test date using the 10th of this month as the first day of your last period and a 29-day cycle, then save the resulting plan to your account.

tasks.instruction: Find early-detection home pregnancy tests under $20 with at least a 4.0-star rating, compare the two cheapest options, and favorite the one that includes more tests per box.

tasks.instruction: Find two medically reviewed articles published within the last 3 years whose titles mention both “false negative” and “missed period,” and save them to your reading list.

target_names: False Negative Pregnancy Test After a Missed Period: What It Means
Top 7 Causes of a False Negative Pregnancy Test After Your Missed Period

tasks.instruction: Post an anonymous question in the pregnancy test results Q&A category about getting a faint positive pregnancy test 2 days before your expected period.

tasks.instruction: Create a testing reminder plan with three pregnancy test reminders scheduled at 7:00 AM on days 2, 4, and 7 from today, each with a unique label, and save the plan.

tasks.instruction: Complete the pregnancy symptom checker assuming you are 3 days late with mild nausea and sore breasts, then open the first recommended guide about when to take a pregnancy test.

target_names: When to Take a Pregnancy Test: Day-by-Day Guide

tasks.instruction: Find and open an article in the pregnancy test results or similar category that explains why a negative pregnancy test might still mean you could be pregnant, has a stated reading time of 7 minutes or less, and add it to your reading list.

target_names: Negative Test but Pregnant? 6 Reasons It Can Happen

tasks.instruction: From the pregnancy test catalog, save the highest-rated digital pregnancy test to your favorites, then save the cheapest strip-style pregnancy test priced at $10 or less to your favorites.

tasks.instruction: Using the store locator, find a pharmacy within 5 miles of ZIP code 10001 that currently shows at least one early-detection midstream pregnancy test in stock, and open that store’s detail or map view.
